module.name: HiddenSearch
module.group: elaSeconds delta from latest 3.x to latest 4.x (delta shown as percent of 3.x elaSeconds)
module.param: NOT (pname OR period OR race) AND metric=elaSeconds AND branch=current AND (suite=j2ee_8gb) AND NOT platform=windows2003_32b | DEDUP platform,suite,test | EVAL testInSuite = test . "-in-" . suite | RENAME value AS valueCur | JOIN platform,testInSuite [search NOT (pname OR period OR race) AND metric=elaSeconds AND branch=3.x AND (suite=j2ee_8gb) AND NOT platform=windows2003_32b | DEDUP platform,suite,test | EVAL testInSuite = test . "-in-" . suite | RENAME value AS value3x] | EVAL valueDeltaPct = (valueCur - value3x) / (value3x / 100) | CHART avg(valueDeltaPct) BY testInSuite, platform

module.name: HiddenSearch
module.group: elaSeconds delta from latest 3.x to latest 4.x (delta shown as percent of 3.x elaSeconds)
module.param: NOT (pname OR period OR race) AND metric=elaSeconds AND branch=current AND (suite=j2ee_8gb) AND NOT platform=windows2003_32b | DEDUP platform,suite,test | EVAL testInSuite = test . "-in-" . suite | RENAME value AS valueCur | JOIN platform,testInSuite [search NOT (pname OR period OR race) AND metric=elaSeconds AND branch=3.x AND (suite=j2ee_8gb) AND NOT platform=windows2003_32b | DEDUP platform,suite,test | EVAL testInSuite = test . "-in-" . suite | RENAME value AS value3x] | EVAL valueDeltaPct = (valueCur - value3x) / (value3x / 100) | CHART avg(valueDeltaPct) BY testInSuite, platform

module.name: HiddenSearch
module.param: NOT (pname OR period OR race) metric=elaSeconds branch=current suite=j2ee_8gb test=broad_uncached | CHART avg(value) BY change, platform

module.name: HiddenSearch
module.param: NOT (pname OR period OR race) metric=elaSeconds branch=current suite=j2ee_8gb test=sparse_cached | CHART avg(value) BY change, platform

module.name: HiddenSearch
module.param: NOT (pname OR period OR race) metric=elaSeconds branch=current suite=j2ee_8gb test=sparse_uncached | CHART avg(value) BY change, platform

module.param: NOT (pname OR period OR race) metric=elaSeconds branch=current suite=j2ee_8gb test=broad_uncached | CHART avg(value) BY change, platform

module.param: NOT (pname OR period OR race) metric=elaSeconds branch=current suite=j2ee_8gb test=sparse_cached | CHART avg(value) BY change, platform

module.param: NOT (pname OR period OR race) metric=elaSeconds branch=current suite=j2ee_8gb test=sparse_uncached | CHART avg(value) BY change, platform

module.name: HiddenSearch
module.param: NOT (pname OR period OR race) metric=elaSeconds branch=3.x suite=j2ee_8gb test=broad_uncached | CHART avg(value) BY change, platform

module.param: NOT (pname OR period OR race) metric=elaSeconds branch=3.x suite=j2ee_8gb test=sparse_cached | CHART avg(value) BY change, platform

module.param: NOT (pname OR period OR race) metric=elaSeconds branch=3.x suite=j2ee_8gb test=sparse_uncached | CHART avg(value) BY change, platform

module.param: NOT (pname OR period OR race) metric=elaSeconds branch=3.x suite=j2ee_8gb test=broad_uncached | CHART avg(value) BY change, platform

module.param: NOT (pname OR period OR race) metric=elaSeconds branch=3.x suite=j2ee_8gb test=sparse_cached | CHART avg(value) BY change, platform

module.name: HiddenSearch
module.param: NOT (pname OR period OR race) metric=elaSeconds branch=3.x suite=j2ee_8gb test=sparse_uncached | CHART avg(value) BY change, platform
